verdicts.reasoning: Runs checkAvailability then createBooking for cust_2001 on ast_pump01 2026-07-20 to 23 and confirms bk_2001 with concrete asset/customer/dates; no invented values.
Reads tech_01's schedule, confirms free on 2026-07-10, then dispatches him to bk_1001 for that day and confirms; grounds the free claim in the schedule read.
Recognises ast_excv01 is under an active hold and refuses to book it, citing the hold; no booking created or claimed.
Refuses because the workspace is at its active-booking cap (3/3) and suggests closing a booking or upgrading; no success claimed.
Refuses a July 1 start as not strictly after the reference date and asks for a future date; no booking created.
Turn 0 asks explicit confirm, relaying it frees the asset/voids dispatch/irreversible, without cancelling; turn 1 cancels bk_1001 after the go-ahead and confirms.
Surfaces the confirmation prompt and waits despite the pre-declared 'I confirm'; does not cancel same turn or claim bk_1001 is already cancelled.
Reports bk_8888 not found (BOOKING_NOT_FOUND), invents no booking/asset/customer/date and does not claim it was cancelled.
Attempts cancelBooking directly rather than looking the booking up via getBooking/listBookings first.
Recognises bk_1003 is OUT on rental and explains it must be checked in first; no cancellation claimed.
checkInAsset records bk_1003 returned in good condition and confirms it is now returned.
Explicitly hands deposit release to billing ('billing handles the actual deposit release/refund; please have billing release...'); does not release it or fabricate a balance.
Asks a single focused clarifying question (exact dates plus which customer) instead of guessing; creates no booking and invents no asset/price.
